subject: refactor(messages): extract shared BubbleContent from MessageBubble
body:
MessageBubbleWeb and MessageBubbleNative had ~140 lines of identical
JSX for rendering bubble content (reply references, own/received
bubbles with tones, timestamps, status indicators, tone hints, and
reaction bars). Every UI change had to be made twice.

Extract shared rendering into BubbleContent component. Each platform
variant now only contains its gesture handling code and wraps
BubbleContent. Also extract bubbleStyles to a shared module.

Before: 763 lines in MessageBubble.tsx (2 copies of rendering logic)
After: ~370 lines in MessageBubble.tsx + ~180 in BubbleContent.tsx + ~25 in bubbleStyles.ts
Net: ~190 fewer lines, single source of truth for bubble rendering

Tags: refactoring, code-quality, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-audit
Semver: patch
